author: max
name: SlashHelpMenu
install_msg:
Thanks for installing.
You will need to enable the cog via `[p]slash enable`. you can also enable ephemeral messages with `[p]slashhelpset toggle`.
If you enjoy my work, you can donate at [buymeacoffee](<https://buymeacoffee.com/ltzmax>)
description: Slash Help Menu Cog that provides a help menu for slash commands only.
short: Slash Help Menu Cog that provides a help menu for slash commands only.
end_user_data_statement: This cog does not store any End User Data.
